name: Cod Fish a La Mode August 1997
recipeIngredient: 1 lb salted codfish, soaked in water, skinned, and boned
1 large bell pepper, seeded and sliced
4 potatoes, cooked in their skins, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the fish overnight, changing water 3 times.
2. Dice or shred the codfish into large pieces. Squeeze out excess liquid.
3. Heat 3 tbsp olive oil in a skillet and add codfish. Cook until slightly colored (it will give off water). Let the water evaporate. Remove to a plate.
4. Add onions and cook until onions are soft. Transfer to a plate.
5. Cook bell pepper for 2 minutes in the same skillet.
6. Oil a small Pyrex dish and arrange layers starting with the potatoes, then codfish, onions, 1 tbsp chopped parsley, bell pepper, tomato, and potatoes. Drizzle with 4 tbsp olive oil.
7. Spread dots of butter on top of the potatoes.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
9. Serve topped with sliced egg and sprinkled with the remaining parsley.
